description.value: The area of this spell is covered in chilling frost, dealing 2d6 points of cold damage to all creatures within it. Creatures that the spell initially damages must succeed at a Fortitude save or become staggered for 1 round. The area remains chilled for the spellâs duration. Any creature that starts your turn within the spellâs area takes 1d6 points of cold damage ( Fortitude saving throw for half) but does not become staggered even on a failed saving throw.
